vocabulary.example: We need to meet the deadline by Friday.
The deployment went smoothly last night.
I don't have the bandwidth to take on a new project right now.
Let's prioritize the items in the backlog.
We'll deliver this feature in the next sprint.
There's a blocker on the API integration side.
We need a scalable solution for the long term.
We'll present the roadmap to all stakeholders next week.
Let's iterate on the design based on user feedback.
The new engineer is going through the onboarding process.
We have to avoid scope creep or we'll miss the deadline.
Please review my pull request when you have a moment.
We should refactor this module before adding new features.
The product roadmap for Q3 is ready to share.
We need to resolve the dependencies before we can proceed.

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: Good morning, everyone. Let's start the sprint review. What did the team deliver this week?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: We completed the login module and fixed three critical bugs from the backlog.

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: Great progress. Are there any blockers we should be aware of?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Yes, we're waiting on the API credentials from the client. It's blocking the payment integration.

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: Understood. I'll follow up with them today. Anything else for the next sprint?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: We'd like to prioritize the dashboard feature. It's at the top of the backlog.

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: Hi, this is Mark from TechCorp. Am I speaking with the support team?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Yes, this is Alex speaking. How can I help you today?

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: We're experiencing a production issue. The deployment from last night seems to have broken something.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: I understand. Can you describe the issue in more detail so I can escalate it to the right team?

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: Sure. Users can't log in after the update. We're getting a 500 error.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Got it. I'll flag this as a critical blocker and have someone contact you within 30 minutes.

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: Tell me a bit about your experience with agile development.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: I've been working in agile environments for three years. I'm familiar with sprint planning, daily stand-ups, and retrospectives.

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: How do you handle tight deadlines when there's scope creep?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: I communicate with stakeholders early and try to re-prioritize the backlog so we focus on what delivers the most value.

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: What's your approach when you're stuck on a technical problem?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: I first try to isolate the issue, then check the documentation, and if I'm still blocked I reach out to a senior colleague.

emails.title: Proje gecikme bildirimi
emails.scenario: Proje müdürüne (David Clarke) API entegrasyonu nedeniyle projenin 1 hafta gecikeceğini bildirmen gerekiyor. Nedeni açıkla ve yeni teslim tarihini belirt.
emails.referenceEmail:
Dear David,

I am writing to inform you of a delay in the current project timeline. Due to an unexpected issue with the third-party API integration, we are unable to meet the original deadline.

We anticipate a delay of approximately one week. The revised delivery date will be the 25th of June. Our team is working to resolve the dependency as quickly as possible.

I apologize for any inconvenience and will keep you updated on our progress.

Best regards,
Alex

emails.title: Pull request inceleme talebi
emails.scenario: Ekip arkadaşın Sarah'ya pull request'ini incelemesini rica edeceksin. PR'ın ne içerdiğini kısaca açıkla ve ne zaman müsait olabileceğini sor.
emails.referenceEmail:
Hi Sarah,

I hope you're doing well. I have just submitted a pull request for the new dashboard feature and would appreciate your review when you have a moment.

The PR includes the updated API calls, the new chart components, and a few minor bug fixes. It should take around 20 minutes to review.

Please let me know if you have any questions or need clarification on any part of the code.

Thanks in advance,
Alex

quiz.prompt: A teammate says there's a 'blocker'. This means:
options: A task is stopped by an obstacle
quiz.explanation: A 'blocker' is something that stops progress until resolved.

quiz.prompt: Polite way to ask for a code review:
options: Could you review my pull request when you have a moment?
Why didn't you review my code?
quiz.explanation: Soft, time-respecting phrasing is most professional.

quiz.prompt: 'I don't have the bandwidth this sprint' means:
quiz.explanation: 'Bandwidth' = available time/capacity in work slang.

quiz.prompt: Best way to report a delay to a stakeholder:
options: We'll be about a week late due to an API issue; new date is the 25th.
quiz.explanation: State the cause, impact, and a revised date clearly.

options: Improve it gradually based on feedback
quiz.explanation: To iterate is to refine in repeated cycles.

vocabulary.example: Our revenue increased by 15% in Q2.
The sales forecast for next quarter looks promising.
We're diversifying the client's investment portfolio.
All transactions must go through the compliance team.
The company has strong liquidity to cover short-term obligations.
We completed the due diligence before signing the agreement.
The bond has a yield of 4.5% annually.
We need to reduce overhead costs this quarter.
Please update the general ledger with this transaction.
We will amortize the loan over ten years.
The external audit is scheduled for next month.
The bottom line improved significantly after cost cuts.
They offered equity as part of the compensation package.
We hedge our currency risk with forward contracts.
We need to reconcile the accounts before month-end closing.

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: Let's go over the Q3 budget. How are we tracking against the forecast?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: We're slightly over on overhead costs, but revenue is up 12% compared to last quarter.

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: Good. What's driving the overhead increase?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Mainly the new office lease and additional compliance software we purchased.

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: We need to find ways to offset that. Any suggestions?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: I'd recommend reviewing vendor contracts. We may be able to renegotiate a few to improve the bottom line.

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: Hello, I'm calling about my investment portfolio. I'm concerned about the recent market volatility.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Thank you for calling. I completely understand your concern. Could you give me your account number so I can pull up your portfolio?

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: Of course. It's 4872-991.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Thank you. I can see your portfolio here. Given your risk profile, your current allocation looks well-diversified.

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: Should I consider moving to safer assets for now?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: That's worth discussing. I'd suggest we schedule a meeting to review your long-term goals before making any changes.

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: Walk me through how you would evaluate a company's financial health.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: I would start by looking at the income statement to assess revenue trends and the bottom line, then review the balance sheet for liquidity and equity.

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: How do you handle tight reporting deadlines?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: I prioritize tasks and make sure the data is reconciled early so the final report doesn't have errors under pressure.

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: Have you worked with compliance teams before?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Yes, in my previous role I coordinated with the compliance department to ensure all transactions met regulatory requirements.

emails.title: Aylık rapor gönderimi
emails.scenario: Yöneticiniz Karen Walsh'a Mayıs ayı finansal raporunu gönderiyorsun. Raporu ekle, önemli bulgulardan kısaca bahset ve sorular için müsait olduğunu belirt.
emails.referenceEmail:
Dear Karen,

Please find attached the financial report for the month of May. I have completed the reconciliation and everything is in order.

A few highlights from this month: revenue is up 8% compared to April, and we have successfully reduced overhead costs by 5% following the vendor renegotiations.

Please let me know if you have any questions or require further clarification on any of the figures.

Best regards,
Alex

emails.title: Denetim randevusu talebi
emails.scenario: Dış denetim firmasından Tom Brady'ye ulaşıyorsun. Haziran ayında bir denetim zamanı ayarlamak istiyorsun ve uygun günlerini soruyorsun.
emails.referenceEmail:
Dear Tom,

I hope this email finds you well. I am reaching out to schedule the external audit for the month of June.

Could you please let us know your available dates so we can coordinate accordingly? We are flexible and can accommodate your schedule.

Please also let us know if there are any documents you would like us to prepare in advance.

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Best regards,
Alex

quiz.explanation: Reconciliation ensures figures agree before closing.

quiz.prompt: Professional way to send a monthly report:
options: Please find attached the May report; happy to answer any questions.
quiz.explanation: Polite, offers follow-up support.
Liquidity = ability to meet short-term cash needs.
Overhead = general running expenses.

options: Could you let us know your available dates for the audit?
quiz.explanation: Asks for availability courteously.

vocabulary.example: Please complete the patient intake form before your appointment.
Your GP will send a referral to the specialist.
The diagnosis was confirmed after the lab results came back.
We follow strict infection control protocols in this department.
Patient compliance with medication is essential for recovery.
The nurse will triage all patients as they arrive.
The prognosis is positive with early intervention.
The patient is scheduled for discharge tomorrow morning.
We need the patient's informed consent before the procedure.
The patient has been moved to the recovery ward.
Aspirin is contraindicated for patients with bleeding disorders.
Please schedule a follow-up appointment in two weeks.
The dosage should be adjusted based on the patient's weight.
A multidisciplinary team will review the case.
The patient reported an adverse reaction to the new medication.

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: Can you brief us on the patient in room 4 before the shift handover?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Of course. The patient was admitted yesterday with chest pain. The diagnosis is stable angina and he's responding well to medication.

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: Any contraindications we should be aware of?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Yes, he has a documented allergy to aspirin, so we've adjusted the protocol accordingly.

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: What's the plan for discharge?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: We're aiming for discharge tomorrow if the morning tests come back clear. A follow-up has already been scheduled.

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: Good afternoon, I'd like to book a follow-up appointment with Dr. Yılmaz.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Of course. Could I have your name and date of birth for verification, please?

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: It's James Miller, born on the 12th of March 1978.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Thank you, Mr. Miller. Dr. Yılmaz has availability on Thursday at 10 AM or Friday at 2 PM. Which would you prefer?

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: Thursday at 10 works for me.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Perfect. I've booked that for you. Please bring your most recent test results to the appointment.

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: How do you handle situations where clinical staff disagree on a patient's treatment protocol?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: I would bring together a multidisciplinary team to review the case and ensure the decision is evidence-based and in the patient's best interest.

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: How do you ensure patient compliance with treatment plans?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Clear communication is key. I make sure patients understand their diagnosis, dosage instructions, and the importance of their follow-up appointments.

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: Tell me about a challenging situation you've managed under pressure.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: During a busy triage period, I coordinated the ward team to prioritize critical cases while maintaining care quality for all other patients.

emails.title: Hasta taburculuk özeti
emails.scenario: Aile hekimi Dr. Selin Arslan'a hastanı taburcu ettiğini bildiriyorsun. Tanıyı, verilen ilaçları ve takip planını özetle.
emails.referenceEmail:
Dear Dr. Arslan,

I am writing to inform you that your patient, Mr. James Miller, was discharged from our ward this morning.

His diagnosis was stable angina. He has been prescribed a daily dosage of beta-blockers and has been advised to avoid strenuous activity for two weeks. A follow-up appointment has been scheduled at your clinic for the 28th of June.

Please do not hesitate to contact us if you require any further information.

Kind regards,
Dr. Alex

emails.title: Uzman hekime sevk talebi
emails.scenario: Kardiyoloji uzmanı Dr. Mark Evans'a bir hastanı sevk ediyorsun. Hastanın semptomlarını ve aciliyetini belirt.
emails.referenceEmail:
Dear Dr. Evans,

I would like to refer one of my patients, Ms. Ayşe Kaya, for a cardiology consultation. She has been experiencing recurring chest pain and shortness of breath over the past three weeks.

Given her symptoms and family history of heart disease, I believe a specialist assessment is needed as soon as possible. I have attached her recent test results for your review.

Please let me know your earliest available appointment.

Kind regards,
Dr. Alex

quiz.prompt: 'The patient was discharged' means the patient:
quiz.explanation: Discharge = release from hospital/care.

quiz.prompt: Aspirin is 'contraindicated' for a patient. You should:
quiz.explanation: Contraindicated means it should not be used.

quiz.prompt: Polite phone opening when booking an appointment:
options: Could I have your name and date of birth, please?
quiz.explanation: Verifying identity politely is standard practice.
Compliance = how well a patient follows instructions.

options: Sends a patient to a specialist
quiz.explanation: A referral directs a patient to specialist care.

vocabulary.example: We need to do a full inventory check before the sale.
Our conversion rate increased after we improved the checkout flow.
Please check the SKU number before processing the return.
We received a chargeback from the customer's bank.
We'll apply a 20% markdown on all winter stock.
Footfall was down this weekend due to the rain.
Our fulfilment centre ships orders within 24 hours.
Train staff to upsell premium products at the checkout.
We need to reduce shrinkage caused by theft and damage.
Our average basket size grew thanks to the bundle offers.
We're switching to a new supplier for better pricing.
Set the reorder point at 50 units to avoid stockouts.
Our loyalty programme has over 200,000 active members.
We're working to reduce the return rate for online orders.
We hire extra staff during the peak season.

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: Let's review last week's numbers. How did we perform against target?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Overall we hit 94% of our sales target. Footfall was strong on Saturday but dropped mid-week.

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: What about our conversion rate?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: It improved slightly to 3.8%. The new product layout on the website seems to be helping.

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: Good. What can we do to push basket size higher?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: I'd suggest training the team on upselling techniques and promoting our bundle deals more aggressively at checkout.

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: Hello, this is Dan from FastShip Logistics. I'm calling about your upcoming peak season order.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Hi Dan, thanks for calling. Yes, we need to confirm our fulfilment capacity for November.

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: We can handle up to 5,000 orders per day. Will that be sufficient?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: That should work. We'd also like to discuss reducing the lead time on reorders to avoid any stockouts.

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: We can offer a 48-hour turnaround if you commit to a minimum monthly volume.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: That sounds reasonable. Let me check the numbers and get back to you by Thursday.

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: How do you manage inventory during a high-demand period like peak season?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: I monitor stock levels closely and set reorder points early. I also work with suppliers to ensure faster delivery times.

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: How do you handle high return rates on online orders?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: I review the reasons for returns and address root causes — whether that's sizing issues, poor product descriptions, or packaging problems.

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: How would you motivate a team during a slow sales period?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: I'd set short-term targets, celebrate small wins, and focus on upselling training to keep the team engaged and productive.

emails.title: Tedarikçiye sipariş talebi
emails.scenario: Tedarikçin Emma Brooks'a yeni bir sipariş vermek istiyorsun. 500 adet SKU-2281 ürününe ihtiyacın var, en geç 10 Temmuz'a kadar teslim edilmesini istiyorsun.
emails.referenceEmail:
Dear Emma,

I hope you are well. I am writing to place a new order for 500 units of SKU-2281. We are approaching our reorder point and would like to ensure we have sufficient stock ahead of the peak season.

Could you please confirm whether delivery by the 10th of July is achievable? If there are any issues with this timeline, please let us know as soon as possible.

Thank you for your continued support.

Best regards,
Alex

emails.title: Müşteri şikayeti yanıtı
emails.scenario: Müşteri John Parker siparişinin geç geldiğini şikayet etti. Özür dileyeceksin, gecikmeni açıklayacaksın ve bir sonraki alışverişi için indirim kodu sunacaksın.
emails.referenceEmail:
Dear John,

Thank you for getting in touch, and I sincerely apologize for the delay with your recent order. This is not the level of service we aim to provide.

The delay was caused by an unexpected issue at our fulfilment centre during a high-volume period. We are working hard to prevent this from happening again.

As a gesture of goodwill, please find below a discount code for 15% off your next order: SORRY15

Thank you for your patience and understanding.

Kind regards,
Alex

quiz.explanation: Inventory = stock on hand.

quiz.prompt: Best response to a late-delivery complaint:
options: I sincerely apologize for the delay; here's a discount on your next order.
quiz.explanation: Apologize, explain, and offer goodwill.
Conversion = share of visitors who purchase.
Upselling moves customers to premium options.

quiz.prompt: 'Reorder point' is the stock level at which you:
quiz.explanation: It triggers a replenishment order to avoid stockouts.

vocabulary.example: Our target audience is professionals aged 25 to 40.
This campaign is focused on building brand awareness.
Our Instagram engagement rate doubled last month.
The campaign delivered a 300% ROI.
The call to action on the landing page needs to be clearer.
We need to optimize the top of the funnel to get more leads.
We ran an A/B test on two different subject lines.
The ad received 2 million impressions in the first week.
Let's map out the content calendar for Q3.
The webinar was great for lead generation.

vocabulary.turkish: geri dönüş oranı / siteden çıkış oranı
vocabulary.example: Our bounce rate is too high — the landing page needs work.
Please confirm the deliverables for this campaign.
The client approved the creative brief this morning.
We're pitching to the new client on Wednesday.
Let's define the KPIs for this campaign before we start.

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: Thanks for joining. Let's go over the brief for the new product launch campaign.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Of course. Could you confirm the target audience and the main KPIs we'll be measured on?

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: The target audience is urban professionals aged 28 to 45. We want to focus on brand awareness and lead generation.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Understood. What's the budget, and when do we need the deliverables?

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: The budget is 50,000 dollars and we need the first draft by the end of the month.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: We can work with that. I'll set up the content calendar and share it with you by Friday for alignment.

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: Hi, I'm calling to get an update on the campaign performance. How are we tracking?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Hi! Great timing. The campaign has generated over 1.5 million impressions in the first two weeks.

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: What about the engagement rate and ROI so far?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Engagement is at 4.2%, which is above our benchmark. It's too early for a full ROI calculation, but early signs are very positive.

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: Are there any areas you'd like to optimize?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Yes — the bounce rate on the landing page is a bit high. We're running an A/B test on the call to action to address that.

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: Walk me through a successful campaign you've managed.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: I led a lead generation campaign for a B2B client last year. We used a mix of content marketing and paid ads, and achieved a 250% ROI within three months.

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: How do you define and track KPIs for a campaign?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: I start by aligning KPIs with the client's business goals — whether that's brand awareness, engagement rate, or conversions — then track them weekly against benchmarks.

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: How do you handle a campaign that's underperforming?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: I review the funnel to identify where we're losing people, run A/B tests on key elements, and adjust the strategy based on the data.

emails.title: Kampanya teklif sunumu
emails.scenario: Yeni bir müşteri olan Lisa Chen'e kampanya teklifini e-posta ile gönderiyorsun. Teklifi ekle, özet sun ve bir toplantı ayarlamayı öner.
emails.referenceEmail:
Dear Lisa,

Thank you for the opportunity to pitch for your upcoming campaign. Please find attached our proposal, which outlines our recommended strategy, deliverables, and timeline.

In summary, we are proposing a three-month digital campaign focused on brand awareness and lead generation, targeting your core audience of professionals aged 30 to 45. We believe this approach will deliver a strong ROI based on our previous results in your sector.

I would love to schedule a call to walk you through the proposal in more detail. Please let me know a time that works for you.

Looking forward to working together.

Best regards,
Alex

emails.title: Kampanya sonuç raporu
emails.scenario: Müşteri David Nguyen'e tamamlanan kampanyanın sonuçlarını bildiriyorsun. Ana metrikleri paylaş, başarıları vurgula ve sonraki adımı öner.
emails.referenceEmail:
Dear David,

I am pleased to share the final results of the campaign we ran over the past three months.

Highlights include: 4.2 million total impressions, an average engagement rate of 5.1%, and a conversion rate of 3.8%. The overall ROI came in at 280%, which exceeds our initial target.

We have also identified several insights from our A/B testing that we can apply to future campaigns to improve performance further.

I would love to discuss the next steps and explore how we can build on this success. Please let me know your availability for a call next week.

Best regards,
Alex

options: The specific group you aim to reach
quiz.explanation: It's the intended customer segment.
Bounce rate = visitors who leave without interacting.
ROI compares gains to the cost spent.

quiz.prompt: Professional way to share campaign results:
options: Engagement was 5.1% and ROI 280%, exceeding our target.
quiz.explanation: Lead with concrete, measurable outcomes.

options: A prompt telling users what to do next
quiz.explanation: CTA guides the user toward the next step.

vocabulary.turkish: hazırlık / her şeyin yerli yerinde olması
vocabulary.example: Good mise en place is the foundation of a smooth service.
We focus on sourcing ingredients from local farmers.
The plating on that dish is absolutely stunning.
Please inform the kitchen of any allergens before ordering.
The yield on this cut of meat is about 70%.
Front of house staff need to know the menu inside out.
Back of house communication is key during a busy service.

vocabulary.turkish: kapak sayısı / servis edilen müşteri sayısı
vocabulary.example: We did 180 covers on Saturday night.
The tasting menu changes with the season.
We need to keep our food cost below 30%.
Staff turnover is high in the restaurant industry.
We have a reservation for eight at 8 PM.
Our fish supplier delivers fresh catch every morning.
Always use separate boards to prevent cross-contamination.
Consistent portion control helps manage food cost.

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: Okay team, let's go over tonight's service. We have 140 covers booked. Any specials to highlight?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Yes, we have a pan-seared sea bass with a saffron sauce as tonight's special. Plating takes about 3 minutes so please give the kitchen enough notice.

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: Good. Any allergen updates the front of house team should know about?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: The mushroom risotto now contains nuts. Make sure every server communicates this clearly to guests before they order.

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: Noted. What's our food cost looking like this week?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: We're at 31%, slightly above target. I've adjusted portion control on two dishes to bring it back down.

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: Good morning, this is Carlo from Fresh Farm Supplies. Am I speaking with the head chef?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Yes, this is Alex. Good morning, Carlo. I'm calling about this week's vegetable order.

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: Of course. Is there an issue with your delivery?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Yes, the courgettes we received yesterday weren't up to our usual standard. We had to discard about a third of them.

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: I sincerely apologize for that. I'll arrange a replacement delivery this afternoon at no extra charge.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Thank you, I appreciate that. Sourcing quality produce is essential for us, so I hope this won't happen again.

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: Tell me about your experience managing a kitchen during high-volume service.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: In my last role, we regularly did over 200 covers on weekends. I coordinated back of house communication and made sure mise en place was perfect before every service.

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: How do you handle food cost and portion control under pressure?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: I train the team on standard portions from day one and run weekly cost checks. Consistency in the kitchen directly impacts our food cost.

turns.speaker: other
turns.text: How would you deal with a supplier who consistently delivers poor quality?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: I would document the issues, communicate them clearly to the supplier, and start sourcing alternatives if the problem isn't resolved quickly.

emails.title: Tedarikçiye şikayet e-postası
emails.scenario: Tedarikçin Marco Rossi'ye teslim edilen malzemelerin kalitesiz olduğunu bildiriyorsun. Yaşanan sorunu açıkla, zararını belirt ve çözüm talep et.
emails.referenceEmail:
Dear Marco,

I am writing regarding the delivery we received on Monday the 16th of June. Unfortunately, a significant portion of the produce did not meet our quality standards.

Specifically, approximately 40% of the tomatoes were overripe and unusable. This resulted in a loss of product and affected our menu preparation for the evening service.

We value our relationship with your company and would appreciate a replacement delivery or credit note at your earliest convenience. We would also welcome a conversation about how we can prevent this from happening in the future.

Thank you for your attention to this matter.

Best regards,
Alex

emails.title: Etkinlik için teklif e-postası
emails.scenario: Bir kurumsal müşteri olan Rachel Green'e 50 kişilik özel akşam yemeği için yemek teklifi gönderiyorsun. Menüyü, fiyatlandırmayı ve detayları özetle.
emails.referenceEmail:
Dear Rachel,

Thank you for considering us for your corporate dinner event. I am pleased to submit our proposal for a private dining experience for 50 guests.

We are proposing a four-course tasting menu featuring seasonal ingredients, all freshly sourced from local suppliers. The menu includes a vegetarian option and we are happy to accommodate any allergens your guests may have.

The price per head is 85 pounds, inclusive of all courses and non-alcoholic beverages. A 20% deposit would be required to confirm the reservation.

Please do not hesitate to reach out if you have any questions. We would love to welcome your team.

Warm regards,
Alex

options: Having everything prepped and in place
quiz.explanation: It means organized preparation before service.

quiz.prompt: Politely informing a guest of a delay:
options: Apologies for the wait; your dish will be ready shortly.
quiz.explanation: Apologize and give reassurance with a timeframe.
Sourcing = procuring ingredients.

quiz.prompt: 'The kitchen is in the weeds' means the team is:
quiz.explanation: 'In the weeds' = swamped during service.

quiz.prompt: Best way to handle a guest allergy note:
options: Confirm it and adjust the dish to avoid the allergen.
quiz.explanation: Allergies must be confirmed and accommodated carefully.
